text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess is convinced that it's her fault
Sweep Tosho's peer decided to quit running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This is because Kawakami Princess bumped into
her when they were running together. Kawakami
Princess remains afraid of putting anyone else
through a similar experience.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The experience has even become a source of
trauma for her, but Sweep Tosho identifies her
attitude as something else in need of a scolding.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone races knowing they could get injured.
It's time to remind Kawakami Princess what really
matters when it comes to racing!
